string.text: Keeper of the "Monolith" faction. It's better to keep your distance from him. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Member of the "Monolith" faction. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Commander of the military assault.
Military stalker. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Detailed information is unavailable.
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Vasily Unlucky
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Former digger. With his group of like-minded individuals, he explores all the abandoned laboratories and bunkers he can access.
Krot
One of the participants in the deadly battles at the Arena. Detailed information is unavailable.
Experienced smuggler. Known for managing to smuggle several hundred mutant carcasses out of the forbidden zone in a short period.
Arni
Bar guard. Or, if you prefer, the bartender's bodyguard. Nothing is known about his true identity or past.
Garik
Garik's twin brother. Guard at the bar entrance. As silent as his brother.
Zhorik

Not a saint, not a scoundrel, knows his worth, and is respected among stalkers. There are rumors that he hides from his dark past in the Zone. After getting caught in an anomaly, he started limping and decided to change his line of work. He set up a bar near the Duty faction, which became the main gathering spot for Zone veterans. The bartender has many connections both inside the Zone and in the outside world.
Bartender
Beast
Constantly drunk member of the Duty faction. Duty gave him one last chance to stay in the faction by completing a task, but he is drunk and unable to carry it out.
Brom

Good-natured jester, his only problem is that he can only shoot with a hunting rifle. He doesn't try anything else. Recently, he got into a skirmish in the Wild Territory and lost his family rifle. Now he hangs around the bar, hoping someone will return his rifle to him.
Hunter
Mysterious stalker who knows a lot. Trades information in the bar.
Informer
Leader of all punitive operations and operations to clear large mutant gatherings.
Captain Ivancov
Sergeant Kicenko
Bodyguard of the Arena owner. Only bad things are known about his past, and he hates his brothers.
Lelik
Bald
One of the founders of the Duty faction and its main ideologist. He developed the code of rules and recruited nearly all the key members of Duty.
Colonel Petrenko
Chief of security for Duty's territory.
Sergeant Plichko
Unknown individual affected by the brain-burning anomaly.
Ryaboy
Founder of the Duty faction, leading it for the past five years.
General Voronin
Drunkard.
Unknown stalker. Doubtful reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown stalker. Doubtful reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
One of the bandit leaders. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Borzoi
Doctor.
Doctor
Unknown mercenary. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Leader of the mercenary faction. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Dishman
Experienced stalker. Detailed information is unavailable.
Vasily Petrovich
No information.
Experienced stalker. Always keeps an ear to the ground.
Zheka Duplet
Kalugin P.I.
Sergeant of mandatory military service of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Detailed information is unavailable.
Private soldier of mandatory military service of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown stalker. Doubtful reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Captain of the super-mandatory service of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Detailed information is unavailable.
Has become the leader of the rookie camp after Wolf. Determined, aggressive, and holds a respected authority among rookies.
Fanatic
Old, seasoned loner of the Zone.
Fox
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Smart rookie. Enjoys the special favor of Wolf, who often sends him on important missions.
Petruha

A legendary figure in his own right, they say he can guide you to any point in the Zone. He charges a high price, but it’s not just about money. He won’t guide people he dislikes for any amount. A veteran, he knows the Zone inside and out.
Guide
Sergeant of mandatory military service of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Detailed information is unavailable.
A stalker nicknamed “Shustriy” for his ability to remain unnoticed and indispensable. The trader sometimes uses him for delicate tasks like following someone, spying, or eavesdropping.
Shustriy
Major, commands the army post by the bridge. Works with stalkers, charging a fee for crossing the bridge.
Major Kuznetsov
Private soldier of mandatory military service of the Ukrainian Armed Forces. Detailed information is unavailable.
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Novice. Recently arrived in the Zone. Detailed information is unavailable.
Just a stalker.
Tolik
Leader of the rookie camp. An old stalker who is ready to retire.
Wolf

He’s been trading since he was young. He sold colored pencils in kindergarten, chewing gum in school, and light drugs in college. When the Zone appeared, he realized he could make good money from it. Known for his ability to establish excellent trade relations with the most diverse clients.
Sidorovich
Stalker from the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Officer from the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Prapor
Novice. Taking his first steps in the Zone.
Yurik
Ran into the Zone, hiding from law enforcement. Tries to maintain order in the Zone as he sees it. A fighter against lawlessness. Harsh but fair.
Bes
Novice. Recently arrived in the Zone. Detailed information is unavailable.
A stalker with a dirty face and an equally dirty biography.
Grey
Experienced stalker. Detailed information is unavailable.
Fighter of the "Duty" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Commander of the "Duty" faction's special forces squad. Usually well-equipped.
Cherep
Fighter of the "Duty" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Well-known informant and informer in the Zone.
Ara
Unknown mercenary. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Likely new to the Zone. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Guardian of the "Monolit" faction. It's better to stay away from him. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolit" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
One of the Zone veterans. This stalker knows the Zone like the back of his hand. Usually well-equipped and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Veteran stalker. Possibly well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Commander of the Barrier. A person who has gathered around him people willing to die for the common cause.
Kap
Bodyguard of "Lukasha", the leader of the "Freedom" faction.
Cook of the "Freedom" faction. A drunkard and troublemaker, but an excellent cook.
Cook
Well-known mechanic in the Zone. Can turn a tractor into a tank.
Shurup
Leader of the "Freedom" faction.
Lukash
Master of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Guardian of the "Freedom" faction. Fanatically loyal to the faction. Well-equipped and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Max
Guardian of the "Freedom" faction. Well-equipped and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Ugryumy
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Sniper of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Fighter of the "Freedom" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Pavlik
Known for his greed and stubbornness, but it is said he can get anything you need.
Skryaga
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Crazy Stalker of the "Freedom" faction
Fighter of the "Freedom" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Sasha Bely
Veteran stalker. Possibly well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Elite stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Leader of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Kharon
Private stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Special forces stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Private soldier. Detailed information is unavailable.
Zombie Soldier
One of the stalkers who wasn't lucky.
Zombie Stalker
Master of the "Duty" faction. Very well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Scientist. Detailed information is unavailable.
Scientist's security. Detailed information is unavailable.
Assistant
Assistant
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Fighter of the "Monolith" faction. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
One of the veterans of the Zone. This stalker knows the Zone like the back of his hand. Usually well-equipped and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Veteran stalker. Possibly well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Master of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
One of the stalkers who wasn't lucky.
Employee of a mobile scientific laboratory. Detailed information is unavailable.
Scientist, expert on anomalous phenomena. Worked in America on secret projects. Recently considered missing in action.
Freeman

Marauder and murderer. A bounty has been placed on his head multiple times. Once had good relations with "Duty" and helped them take their current territory. Now lives in the wild territory, robbing lonely stalkers with his gang.
Happy
Doctor of Biological Sciences. Studied pathogenic mutations in animals outside the Zone. Came to the Zone to study mutations of blind dogs.
Prof. Kruglov
One of the "heroes" of the Mercenary faction. Shot by all calibers, a veteran. A rare psychopath and sadist.
Tyrant
One of the field commanders of the "Mercenaries". Commander of a squad of militants, calling themselves "dogs". An anarchist who despises any laws except the law of strength.
Volkodav
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" special unit - "Cristall," responsible for protecting the Monolith itself.
Arni
Beast
Vasya "Kab?n"
Psychomaterial entity created by the "Monolith".
Borov
Madman
Prop
Security Chief
"Skull"
Outpost Commander
Yurik
Zh?ka "Duplet"
"Fanat"
"Lis"
Gordon
Haron
"Bes"
Ara
Captain Ivankov
Stalker "Krot"
Prof. Kruglov
Major Kuznetsov
Lucky
Petrenko
Zhorik
Prof. Sakharov
Ryaboy
"Seryi"
"Kep"
"Kapets"
"Povar"
Shurup
"Lukash"
"Max"
Pavlik
"Skryaga"
"Ugryumyi"
Tiran
Tolik
Volkodav
General Voronin
"Wolf"
Unknown stalker. Questionable reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown stalker. Questionable reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.

Came to the Zone seeking adventure. Poses as a hero from 60s comics. He is called various names: Batman, Macho, Black Cloak, Banderos. Although the fact that he has survived in the Zone for two years speaks volumes, he is still not taken seriously, which greatly bothers him.

Ferocious, angry, rude, selfish, cruel, cold-hearted. No one knows when or how he came to the Zone. He is feared and disliked. He simply lives in the Zone, with no past or future. After one of his many expeditions, he lost his memory and forgot much. He doesn't remember where he's from, nor his real name, often forgetting new acquaintances and, perceiving them as enemies, killing them.
Unknown stalker. Questionable reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown stalker. Questionable reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Keeper of the "Duty" faction. If you're not their friend, it's best to avoid them. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Combatant of the "Duty" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.

Rude, sycophantic, hypocritical, cowardly. Barin's life philosophy could be summarized with the phrase "after us, the flood." He tries to extract profit from everything. Despite this, he is very ambitious and sensitive. He came to the Zone, as clich?d as it sounds, for money. And for the second year in the Zone, he has been acquiring material goods by any means.
Combatant of the "Duty" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.

This is the official recruiter of the SBU. He often sits in the bar. Everyone knows about him, and also that if things get too tough, it's worth going to him. However, after taking this step, the path back to honest stalkers will be closed.

In everyday life, a phlegmatic, does not express his emotions, calm. However, when strongly impressed, he becomes hot-tempered and aggressive. An intellectual. A materialist, deeply regrets that he ended up in the Zone. After graduating from medical school, he was sent to the Zone where the research camp needed a neurosurgery assistant. He dissects mutant brains and studies their psychokinetic abilities. He is waiting for his pension and the opportunity to live in the capital, far from this doomed place.
One of the stalkers who was unlucky.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Unknown mercenary. Possibly well-armed. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Detailed information is unavailable.
Military stalker. Well-armed and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.
Private soldier. Detailed information is unavailable.
Detailed information is unavailable.
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Experienced stalker. Detailed information is unavailable.

An incredibly lucky stalker. Many times his group found itself on the brink of death, and he was always the only one who managed to survive. Among stalkers, he has a bad reputation as the "unlucky talisman." For some time now, he has been walking alone.
One of the veterans of the Zone. This stalker knows the Zone like the back of his hand. Usually well-equipped and very dangerous. Detailed information is unavailable.

A smuggler with experience. He worked for a long time in Africa and South America. Stories about Chernobyl mutants brought him to Ukraine. In a short time, he managed to smuggle several hundred mutant effigies out of the restricted zone, earning the nickname "Chuchelo" ("Effigy"). Between "jobs" in the Zone, he is a successful merchant. He loves Armani suits and Versace ties, but prefers Soviet-made firearms.

A former Afghan veteran. During one of the Mujahideen ambushes, he suddenly found faith in God. After Afghanistan, he immigrated to Poland, where he entered a theological seminary. After graduating, he preached at the Catholic Church in Lviv for a time. After the explosion at Chernobyl, he volunteered to help the victims. For the past few years, he has been preaching on the territory of the Zone.

Former mechanic at the "KholodMash" factory. After his wife left him, he decided to commit suicide, and since he was a religious person, he chose the Zone as a unique way to end his life. But he survived, got himself together over the years, and earned certain respect among the stalkers thanks to his professional skills. Now, Master is the most competent mechanic in the Zone, specializing in equipment and tech repairs, bunker protection systems, and so on. He has access to any doors, is influential, simple but somewhat rude in communication.

A former military stalker, lieutenant colonel of the internal troops. After one operation deep within the Zone, he was the only one to survive from his entire squad, but he found proof that they had all been set up, sent to die. Afterward, he decided not to return, staged his own death, and joined the stalkers to deal with the Zone's problem illegally. He is silent, cynical, and goal-oriented.
A newcomer. Recently arrived in the Zone. Detailed information is unavailable.

Neumeha is 20 years old. He has nothing and no one left on the mainland, so he decided to come here. He simply has nowhere to go. In the Zone, he barely gets by. He owes several stalkers money. He frequently goes to the Zone but never alone, often tagging along with other stalker groups. However, few are willing to take him, as he is seen as a burden. He rarely collects loot. He lives off handouts from other stalkers and is deeply in debt.
Veteran stalker. Possibly well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Veteran stalker. Possibly well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.

Oleg "Demon" Gusarov. A former "black beret," served in the Belotserkovsky Special Forces Brigade. A seasoned conscript, senior sergeant, specializing as a sniper and saboteur. Spiritually, he is a "lone wolf." He never takes companions into the Zone, preferring to work alone. He has been repeatedly offered to join factions but always declined for this very reason.

A physics student who dropped out in his fifth year to come to the Zone in search of work. A lover of showing off his "scientific" knowledge and discussing abstract philosophical topics. This tendency to show off makes him disliked by many stalkers. But overall, he's a decent guy. He still believes in lofty ideals.

Vorobey is 27 years old. Cunning, farsighted, but sometimes makes grave mistakes. At times, underhanded. Overall, he leaves a mixed impression. Thin and pale. He came to the Zone out of curiosity and made a personal promise — two months in the Zone and then home. But he ended up staying. On his first excursion into the Zone, he somehow crossed a field full of anomalies without any equipment, unaware of them. When he was told about it, he couldn’t believe it. He now marks that day (October 9) as his second birthday.
Master of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Freedom" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Fighter of the "Freedom" faction. Usually well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.

Leshy, as his brother called him, came to the Zone as a young idealist. But several years of living on the brink of death turned him into a cynical realist. He considers the Zone his home and believes that those who haven’t survived its trials don’t deserve to live on Earth.
Writes essays and stories about the Zone under the pseudonym Arkady. A former journalist, meticulous, tough, but fair. He is respected among stalkers.
One of the stalkers who was unlucky.
One of the stalkers who was unlucky.
One of the stalkers who was unlucky.
Bandit bodyguard. Dubious reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Regular bandit. Dubious reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Bandit novice. Dubious reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Experienced bandit. Dubious reputation. Detailed information is unavailable.
Leader of the bandits.
Borov
Stalker of the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Monolith" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Stalker of the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Sergey Lakhmaty
Stalker of the "Duty" faction. Detailed information is unavailable.
Pulya
Regular soldier. Detailed information is unavailable.
Army special forces. Well-equipped. Detailed information is unavailable.
Experienced stalker. Detailed information is unavailable.
Novice. Recently in the Zone. Detailed information is unavailable.
Ghost
Veteran of Zone research. Participated in the first expeditions of 2007.
Saharov
Scientific staff member of the mobile laboratory. Detailed information is unavailable.
Semenov
Vasilyev
Zombie
Marked One
Fraer
Kocherga
Barin
Prapor
Zob
Upyr
Chuchelo
Father Diodor
Master
Polkan
Neumeha
Oleg "Demon" Gusarov
Umnik
Vorobey
Leshy
Prut
